specific_mechanism: LIOUVILLE-OPT: momentum + Hamiltonian + symplectic integrator + volume monitor
llm_application: Augment weight update with a synthetic momentum variable; define a Hamiltonian over (weights, momentum); use a symplectic discretization scheme for the flow; monitor the phase-space volume as a conserved invariant.
novelty_claim: Symplectic Optimizer Forest-Ruth exists (2025); R627 Symplectic-Verlet was tried. Liouville-theorem topological-defect framing is the distinguishing claim.
